NVDA.title: Blue Trust Inc. Has $2.12 Million Stock Holdings in Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. $AMD
NVDA.summary: Blue Trust Inc. increased its stake in Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) by 43.5% in the first quarter, now holding 10,419 shares valued at $2.12 million. AMD continues to attract substantial institutional interest, with hedge funds and asset managers owning 71.34% of the company. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for AMD, with an average price target of $440.41, as the company consistently surpasses earnings and revenue expectations.

NVDA.title: Capital Advisors Ltd. LLC Trims Stake in NVIDIA Corporation $NVDA
NVDA.summary: Capital Advisors Ltd. LLC reduced its stake in NVIDIA Corporation by 13.9% in the first quarter, selling 4,241 shares and holding 26,332 shares valued at approximately $4.59 million. Despite this trimming by some institutions, NVIDIA maintains strong Wall Street support with an average analyst rating of "Buy" and a consensus price target of $303.84. The company recently reported strong quarterly results, including $1.87 EPS and $81.61 billion in revenue, and has increased its quarterly dividend and authorized an $80 billion share buyback program.

NVDA.title: Is Applied Materials (AMAT) Quietly Rewiring Its AI Moat With New DRAM And Packaging Tools?
NVDA.summary: Applied Materials recently launched new tools for DRAM epitaxy and advanced 3D packaging, aiming to deepen its involvement in AI semiconductor manufacturing. These developments reinforce the company's investment narrative tied to AI-driven demand for leading-edge logic, DRAM, and advanced packaging. While this push strengthens the bull case, investors are urged to consider existing valuations, potential China-related headwinds, and differing analyst forecasts regarding revenue and earnings growth.

NVDA.title: Analog chipmaker Onsemi buys Synaptics in $7B all-stock deal to push into physical AI
NVDA.summary: Onsemi, an analog chipmaker, announced its acquisition of Synaptics Inc. in an all-stock deal valued at $7 billion. This acquisition aims to advance Onsemi's "physical AI" ambitions, bringing AI capabilities to the physical world, especially in robotics, drones, and autonomous vehicles. The deal is expected to expand Onsemi's total addressable market by $30 billion and significantly boost its earnings per share upon closing in mid-2027.

NVDA.title: Morgan Stanley is bullish on humanoid robot shipments, with four major AI companies leading the charge in this trillion-dollar market!
NVDA.summary: Morgan Stanley has significantly increased its forecasts for humanoid robot shipments in China, projecting 50,000 units by 2026 and 446,000 by 2030, driven by deepening commercialization, policy support, and supply chain strength. The Chinese humanoid robot market is expected to reach $15 billion by 2030, transitioning from technology demonstrations to real-world business value. Major companies like Tesla, NVIDIA, WiMi, and XPeng are actively advancing their humanoid robot initiatives, indicating a rapid development phase for the industry.

NVDA.title: Why RPC Stock Dived by Nearly 12% Today
NVDA.summary: RPC (NYSE: RES) saw its stock drop by nearly 12% following the announcement from Tuesday's market close that CEO Ben Palmer would retire by the end of the year. Palmer, who has been with the company since 1996 and served as CFO before

NVDA.title: Aurora Vs. Kodiak: Picking The Best Play In Autonomous Trucking (NASDAQ:AUR)
NVDA.summary: Aurora Innovation, Inc. and Kodiak AI, Inc. are leading contenders in the autonomous trucking sector, both aiming for large-scale commercial deployments by 2027. While Kodiak faced dilution concerns and a stock selloff due to a recent PIPE financing and timeline delay, Aurora maintains a strong commercial pipeline and strategic collaborations. The article discusses both companies' prospects, focusing on their paths to accelerated fleet ramp-up and revenue inflection, with capital sufficiency and execution of DaaS (Driver-as-a-Service) models as key risks.

NVDA.title: GraniteShares 2x Long NVDA Daily ETF To Carry Out 3-for-1 Stock Split On June 26th, 2026
NVDA.summary: The GraniteShares 2x Long NVDA Daily ETF (NASDAQ: NVDL) is set to undergo a 3-for-1 stock split on June 26th, 2026. This action means that investors will receive three shares for each share they currently own, with the per-share price being adjusted accordingly. The split aims to make the ETF more accessible and potentially increase liquidity.

MSFT.title: SG Americas Securities LLC Has $19.42 Million Stock Holdings in Targa Resources, Inc. $TRGP
MSFT.summary: SG Americas Securities LLC decreased its stake in Targa Resources by 42.3% in Q1 2026, holding 77,465 shares valued at approximately $19.42 million. Despite Targa Resources reporting mixed Q1 results with EPS and revenue below expectations, the company raised its quarterly dividend to $1.25 per share. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $272.73 for the stock.

MSFT.title: Procter & Gamble Company (The) $PG Shares Sold by Cardano Risk Management B.V.
MSFT.summary: Cardano Risk Management B.V. significantly reduced its stake in Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) by 90% in Q1 2026, selling over 8.5 million shares. Despite this large sale, other institutional investors either increased or maintained their positions. Procter & Gamble reported stronger-than-expected earnings of $1.59 per share, though revenue slightly missed estimates, and analysts currently maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $160.78 for the stock.

MSFT.title: Salesforce Inc. $CRM Shares Acquired by BTC Capital Management Inc.
MSFT.summary: BTC Capital Management Inc. significantly increased its stake in Salesforce (CRM) by 91.1% in the first quarter, now holding 7,270 shares valued at approximately $1.36 million. This comes as Salesforce reported strong quarterly results, with EPS beating estimates and revenue up 13.3% year over year, and the company announced a new $25 billion share repurchase program. Analysts currently rate Salesforce as a consensus "Moderate Buy."

MSFT.title: Italy's watchdog probes over Microsoft 365 price hike and AI integration (MSFT:NASDAQ)
MSFT.summary: Italy's antitrust authority has launched an investigation into Microsoft Ireland Operations Ltd. and Microsoft due to alleged unfair commercial practices. The probe focuses on a recent price increase for its Microsoft 365 subscription service. The regulator claims that Microsoft failed to adequately inform consumers about this price hike.

MSFT.title: CommVault Systems (NASDAQ:CVLT) Share Price Passes Above 200 Day Moving Average - Should You Sell?
MSFT.summary: CommVault Systems (NASDAQ:CVLT) recently saw its stock price rise above its 200-day moving average, trading at $133.94 after reaching a high of $135.69. This rise is partly attributed to a new multi-year strategic partnership with Microsoft to integrate its AI and cyber-resilience platform into Azure. Despite the positive news, investor sentiment is mixed due to ongoing securities litigation and recent insider stock sales, even as analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" consensus.

MSFT.title: Crowdstrike chief accounting officer Anurag Saha sells $1.02m in stock
MSFT.summary: Crowdstrike's chief accounting officer, Anurag Saha, sold 1,497 shares of Class A Common Stock for over $1 million on June 24, 2026, as part of a 10b5-1 plan. Following the sale, Saha directly owns 53,223 shares. This transaction comes amidst CrowdStrike's shares trading near a high, with significant year-to-date gains, and recent expansions in its AI security tools and partnerships with AWS, Databricks, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

MSFT.title: Crowdstrike CEO George Kurtz sells $2.7m in company stock By Investing.com
MSFT.summary: CrowdStrike CEO George Kurtz sold approximately $2.7 million worth of Class A common stock over two days in June 2026, executing a pre-arranged 10b5-1 trading plan. This comes as CrowdStrike shares have surged 41% recently, nearing a 52-week high. Kurtz still directly holds over 2 million shares and indirectly holds more through a family trust.

MSFT.title: Tableau, Qlik in Flux: What It Means for BI Users Amid AI Shift
MSFT.summary: The business intelligence (BI) market is experiencing significant changes as AI-driven analytics reshapes the roles and technology needs of data analysts. This article highlights the leadership transitions at Tableau and Qlik, and their efforts to integrate agentic analytics into their platforms, while new AI-native analytics startups are emerging as alternatives. These shifts underscore the challenge for established BI vendors to balance their traditional user bases with the demands of an evolving AI-centric landscape.

GOOGL.title: Assenagon Asset Management S.A. Has $61.38 Million Stock Position in Verizon Communications Inc. $VZ
GOOGL.summary: Assenagon Asset Management S.A. significantly reduced its stake in Verizon Communications Inc. during the first quarter of 2026, selling 38.3% of its shares, though still holding 1.22 million shares valued at approximately $61.4 million. Despite the reduction, Verizon reported better-than-expected EPS and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.7075 per share, representing an annualized yield of about 6.1%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for VZ, with an average target price of $50.59, influenced by its strong dividend and recent earnings performance, even as it was removed from the Dow Jones Industrial Average.

GOOGL.title: Crowdstrike chief accounting officer Anurag Saha sells $1.02m in stock
GOOGL.summary: Crowdstrike's chief accounting officer, Anurag Saha, sold 1,497 shares of Class A Common Stock for over $1 million on June 24, 2026, as part of a 10b5-1 plan. Following the sale, Saha directly owns 53,223 shares. This transaction comes amidst CrowdStrike's shares trading near a high, with significant year-to-date gains, and recent expansions in its AI security tools and partnerships with AWS, Databricks, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure.

GOOGL.title: Form 4 Vivani Medical Inc For: 25 June By Investing.com
GOOGL.summary: This article from Investing.com is a regulatory filing update, specifically a Form 4 for Vivani Medical Inc. It indicates that the filing pertains to activities on June 25th. The article is very concise and does not provide further details about the content of the Form 4.

GOOGL.title: Tableau, Qlik in Flux: What It Means for BI Users Amid AI Shift
GOOGL.summary: The business intelligence (BI) market is experiencing significant changes as AI-driven analytics reshapes the roles and technology needs of data analysts. This article highlights the leadership transitions at Tableau and Qlik, and their efforts to integrate agentic analytics into their platforms, while new AI-native analytics startups are emerging as alternatives. These shifts underscore the challenge for established BI vendors to balance their traditional user bases with the demands of an evolving AI-centric landscape.

GOOGL.title: Alphabet Inc. (GOOG): Our Calculation of Intrinsic Value
GOOGL.summary: This article provides a detailed discounted cash flow (DCF) analysis for Alphabet Inc. (GOOG), outlining its profile, competitive advantages, and financial strengths. Despite its high quality and strong market position in search and cloud, the analysis suggests that Alphabet's current stock price of ~$367 is significantly overvalued with a -60% margin of safety compared to an estimated intrinsic value of ~$147 per share. The author concludes that future returns for Alphabet will hinge on its ability to effectively monetize AI, sustain search dominance, and expand Google Cloud profitability.

GOOGL.title: Oscar Health director Mario Schlosser sells $30.18m in stock
GOOGL.summary: Oscar Health director Mario Schlosser sold 1,026,500 shares of Class A Common Stock for approximately $30.18 million on June 23, 2026, executed via a Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Despite the sale occurring near the stock's 52-week high and a 95% surge over six months, InvestingPro suggests the stock remains slightly undervalued. Concurrently, Schlosser acquired 1,027,500 shares through conversion of Class B stock, while recent analyst upgrades and strategic adjustments, including his transition to an advisor role, have marked other notable developments for Oscar Health.

GOOGL.title: Form 4 Waters Corporation For: 25 June By Investing.com
GOOGL.summary: This article from Investing.com announces the filing of Form 4 for Waters Corporation on June 25. It appears to be a basic notification without further details within the provided text. The article also includes various market data and other news headlines.

GOOGL.title: Outbrain sets new buyback terms, shares trade quietly on Nasdaq
GOOGL.summary: Outbrain, an adtech company, has refreshed its share repurchase authorization and continues to trade on Nasdaq. The company reported modest revenue growth in 2025, focusing on cost discipline and profitability, while analyst coverage remains limited compared to larger adtech peers. Outbrain operates a content recommendation and native advertising platform, generating revenue from cost-per-click campaigns.
